# html-tags

> HTML/SVG generation for Python.

- [tag](/tag): normalize, attrmap, flatten, Tag, Safe, Fragment, mktag
- [render](/render): render_attrs, to_html
- [dev](/dev): pretty, html_to_tag, repr_html
- [extras](/extras): Datastar, ScopedCSS, Favicon, CSP, Social, Head

- [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt): Complete source code
